# Generated by JARVIN AI

Prompt: You are a senior AI engineer, full-stack developer, and product designer.

Your task is to build a COMPLETE AI web application called:

"VIRAL VIDEO AI"

A platform that generates ultra-realistic videos from text prompts.

-----------------------------------
🚀 CORE FUNCTIONALITY:

1. TEXT TO VIDEO GENERATION
- User types a prompt
- AI generates a video based on the prompt
- Supports styles: cinematic, anime, realistic, cyberpunk, motivational

2. PROMPT ENHANCER (VERY IMPORTANT)
- Automatically improves user prompt
- Adds cinematic details:
  - camera movement
  - lighting
  - mood
  - environment
  - realism

3. IMAGE TO VIDEO (EXTRA VIRAL)
- User uploads an image
- AI animates it into a video
- Adds motion, depth, facial movement

4. VIDEO PREVIEW + DOWNLOAD
- Show generated video
- Download button
- Share button

-----------------------------------
🧠 AI ENGINE (NO API KEY REQUIRED IN UI)

Use open or free models where possible:

- Text-to-video: (simulate or integrate)
  - Model abstraction layer (allow future integration with Sora / Runway / Pika)
- Image animation:
  - Use motion interpolation or frame generation logic
- Prompt enhancer:
  - Built-in LLM logic

-----------------------------------
🎨 UI / UX (VERY IMPORTANT)

- Dark futuristic design
- Neon blue / purple glow
- Glassmorphism cards
- Smooth animations
- Fully responsive (mobile + desktop)
- Looks like a billion-dollar startup

Pages:
1. Landing page (viral style)
2. Dashboard
3. Generator screen

-----------------------------------
⚙️ TECH STACK:

Frontend:
- React + Vite
- Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion (animations)

Backend:
- Node.js + Express

-----------------------------------
🔥 FEATURES THAT MAKE IT VIRAL:

- “Generate Viral Video” button
- Auto-suggest prompts
- Trending templates:
  - motivational
  - luxury lifestyle
  - football edits
  - AI avatars

- Fake loading animation (cinematic progress)
- Sound effects feedback

-----------------------------------
💰 MONETIZATION READY:

- Credit system (users spend credits per video)
- Stripe integration ready (optional mock)

-----------------------------------
📁 OUTPUT:

- Full working project
- Clean folder structure
- Ready to deploy (Replit / Vercel)
- No missing dependencies
- No errors

-----------------------------------
🧠 EXTRA:

- Make everything EXTREMELY POLISHED
- Code must be production-level
- Add comments explaining logic
- Make it easy to upgrade with real AI APIs later

-----------------------------------

GOAL:
Build a viral AI startup-level product that feels like Runway or Pika.

Make it impressive, smooth, and addictive to use.

Open `index.html` in your browser to view the site.
